title: STARR-seq/CapSTARR-seq Pipeline - Input samplesheet schema
description: Schema for validating the input samplesheet CSV file

sample.description: Sample identifier (must be unique, alphanumeric with underscores/hyphens)
sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces or special characters except underscores and hyphens

fastq_1.description: Path to FASTQ file for read 1 (or single-end reads)
fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for read 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq', '.fq.gz', '.fastq' or '.fastq.gz'

fastq_2.description: Path to FASTQ file for read 2 (paired-end only, leave empty for single-end)
fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for read 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq', '.fq.gz', '.fastq' or '.fastq.gz'

type.description: Sample type: 'input' for STARR-seq/RNA samples, 'control' for plasmid/DNA samples
type.errorMessage: Sample type must be either 'input' or 'control'
